scripts.preview:mfe: concurrently -n admin,workspaces,planner,chat,onboarding "pnpm run preview:admin" "pnpm run preview:workspaces" "pnpm run preview:planner" "pnpm run preview:chat" "pnpm run preview:onboarding"
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:mfe && concurrently -n api,mfe,shell -c blue,green,yellow "cd mxsuite-api && mvn spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=dev" "pnpm run preview:mfe" "wait-on tcp:8080 --timeout 120000 && pnpm run dev:shell"
scripts.devlogin: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:mfe && concurrently -n api,mfe,shell -c blue,green,yellow "cd mxsuite-api && mvn spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=dev,devlogin" "pnpm run preview:mfe" "wait-on tcp:8080 --timeout 120000 && pnpm run dev:shell"
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:mfe && pnpm run build:shell
scripts.clean: pnpm -r exec rm -rf dist node_modules && rm -rf node_modules
